acceptanceReviewed.criterion: qd audit is started for M1 implementation nodes
P0/P1 findings are resolved or explicitly dispositioned
No direct Hyprland dependency leaks outside the adapter boundary
qd audit pass reports are recorded

resolvedFindings.title: Hyprland dependency leaked through hostd public API
resolvedFindings.evidence: apps/hostd/src/lib.rs and apps/cli/src/main.rs now keep the real Hyprland adapter construction in the CLI binary composition root.
resolvedFindings.observed: hostd depended on madobe-hyprland and exposed a public run_hyprland_display_action entrypoint.
resolvedFindings.expected: The host daemon library should remain behind the backend-neutral CompositorAdapter contract, with concrete Hyprland wiring at an executable composition root.
resolvedFindings.summary: Removed the hostd madobe-hyprland dependency and moved real Hyprland adapter construction to madobectl's binary entrypoint.

resolvedFindings.title: Public M1 evidence retained local window/user identifiers
resolvedFindings.evidence: M1 evidence command logs, host env files, and workspace JSON artifacts are redacted in this audit branch.
resolvedFindings.observed: Prior public M1 evidence included workspace window addresses/titles plus local hostname and user paths.
resolvedFindings.expected: Committed evidence should preserve technical facts without exposing local user, host, runtime, or window-title data.
resolvedFindings.summary: Redacted older M1 evidence artifacts and command logs to match the M1 fixture redaction standard.

resolvedFindings.title: Workspace/session binding lacks live hardware validation
resolvedFindings.evidence: Added m1-workspace-session-binding-validation as a P1 Linux validation node before M1 closeout.
resolvedFindings.observed: M1 lifecycle hardware evidence proves remote output ownership, but workspace/session binding to the madobe-owned output is only unit-level evidence.
resolvedFindings.expected: M1 should include live Linux evidence for moving or binding a disposable workspace/session to a madobe-owned output before the milestone closes.
resolvedFindings.summary: Split the live binding proof into m1-workspace-session-binding-validation, unlocked by this audit node.
